title: Composition
summary: Evaluates an ordered composition as P_{2I_1} composed with ... composed with P_{2I_r}.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Evaluates an ordered composition as P_{2I_1} composed with ... composed with P_{2I_r}.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows Juhlformula/Juhloperators/Composition.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Ordinary composition of unary ambient operators. In explicit terms, for p, q of type function conf maps to function conf, its defining expression is the function sending f to P Q f.
correspondence.leanType: def composeUnary (P Q : Function Conf → Function Conf) : Function Conf → Function Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For P, Q of type Function Conf maps to Function Conf, and f of type Function Conf, compose Unary P Q f equals P Q f.
correspondence.leanType: theorem composeUnary_apply (P Q : Function Conf → Function Conf) (f : Function Conf) : composeUnary P Q f = P (Q f)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The identity unary operator. In explicit terms, its defining expression is the function sending f to f.
correspondence.leanType: def idUnary : Function Conf → Function Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For f of type Function Conf, id Unary f equals f.
correspondence.leanType: theorem idUnary_apply (f : Function Conf) : idUnary f = f

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Extract the underlying ambient unary operator from an abstract GJMS operator. In explicit terms, for p of type gjms.abstract operator cal conf, its defining expression is P.to Weighted Tangential Operator.to Operator.
correspondence.leanType: def abstractToUnary (P : GJMS.AbstractOperator CalConf) : Function Conf → Function Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For P of type GJMS.Abstract Operator Cal Conf, and f of type Function Conf, abstract To Unary Cal Conf P f equals P.to Weighted Tangential Operator.to Operator f.
correspondence.leanType: theorem abstractToUnary_apply (P : GJMS.AbstractOperator CalConf) (f : Function Conf) : abstractToUnary CalConf P f = P.toWeightedTangentialOperator.toOperator f

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Compose a list of unary operators from left to right. For [P_1, P_2, P_3], this gives P_1 ∘ P_2 ∘ P_3. In explicit terms, its defining expression is | maps to id Unary | P :: Ps maps to compose Unary P compose Unary List Ps.
correspondence.leanType: def composeUnaryList : List (Function Conf → Function Conf) → Function Conf → Function Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: compose Unary List Conf : equals Conf equals id Unary.
For P of type Function Conf maps to Function Conf, and Ps a finite list, compose Unary List Conf : equals Conf P :: Ps equals compose Unary P compose Unary List Ps.
correspondence.leanType: theorem composeUnaryList_cons (P : Function Conf → Function Conf) (Ps : List (Function Conf → Function Conf)) : composeUnaryList (Conf := Conf) (P :: Ps) = composeUnary P (composeUnaryList Ps)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: A general abstract GJMS family indexed by positive integers. In explicit terms, its defining expression is k maps to 0 < k maps to GJMS.Abstract Operator Cal Conf.

The list of underlying unary operators associated to a composition. In explicit terms, for g of type abstract gjmsfamily cal conf, n in the natural numbers, and i of type composition n, its defining expression is I.parts.attach.map the function sending x to abstract To Unary Cal Conf G x.val I.positive x.val x.property.
correspondence.leanType: def operatorListOfComposition (G : AbstractGJMSFamily CalConf) {N : Nat} (I : Composition N) : List (Function Conf → Function Conf)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The composed GJMS operator associated to I. In explicit terms, for g of type abstract gjmsfamily cal conf, n in the natural numbers, and i of type composition n, its defining expression is compose Unary List operator List Of Composition Cal Conf G I.
correspondence.leanType: def composeGJMS (G : AbstractGJMSFamily CalConf) {N : Nat} (I : Composition N) : Function Conf → Function Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For G of type Abstract GJMSFamily Cal Conf, N in the natural numbers, and hN of type 0 < N, operator List Of Composition Cal Conf G Composition.singleton N h N equals abstract To Unary Cal Conf G N h N.
correspondence.leanType: theorem operatorList_singleton (G : AbstractGJMSFamily CalConf) (N : Nat) (hN : 0 < N) : operatorListOfComposition CalConf G (Composition.singleton N hN) = [abstractToUnary CalConf (G N hN)]

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For G of type Abstract GJMSFamily Cal Conf, N in the natural numbers, and hN of type 0 < N, compose GJMS Cal Conf G Composition.singleton N h N equals abstract To Unary Cal Conf G N h N.
correspondence.leanType: theorem composeGJMS_singleton (G : AbstractGJMSFamily CalConf) (N : Nat) (hN : 0 < N) : composeGJMS CalConf G (Composition.singleton N hN) = abstractToUnary CalConf (G N hN)

references.note: Source for ordered GJMS compositions and coefficients.

references.locator: Direct ambient proof of Juhl's formulas
references.note: Ambient interpretation of the composition formula.

limitations: Verified means that Lean checks the propositions encoded in this file and their imported assumptions. It does not assert that the present formal statement exhausts every analytic hypothesis or convention in the cited literature.
